description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named CI that runs on push to master and tags matching v*, on pull requests to master, and daily at 6AM UTC. The workflow has three jobs: lint, test, and deploy. The lint job checks code quality on ubuntu-latest with Python 3.8, caching PyPI dependencies. The test job runs unit tests on multiple Python versions (3.6-3.9) with coverage and uploads results to Codecov. The deploy job uploads distributions to PyPI if a tag is pushed.
